utterance: How many total shot attempts are in the dataset?
notes: Baseline count — no filter. Verified: 7396 total shots.

gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE made_flag = 1
notes: Turn 2: adds made_flag = 1. No player or zone filter — whole dataset.

utterance: How many games are in the dataset?
notes: COUNT DISTINCT on games table. Verified: 106 total games.

utterance: How many players appear in the shot data?
notes: COUNT DISTINCT player_id from shot_charts — counts only players who actually attempted a shot, not all 5103 in players table.

utterance: How many 3-point attempts were there in total?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE shot_type = '3PT Field Goal'
notes: shot_type = '3PT Field Goal' exact string. Turn 2 candidate: could follow with 'how many were made'.

utterance: How many of those went in?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE shot_type = '3PT Field Goal' AND made_flag = 1
notes: Turn 2: carries forward 3PT filter; adds made_flag = 1.

gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE shot_type = '2PT Field Goal'
notes: shot_type = '2PT Field Goal'. Complement of pair 5.

utterance: What is the total number of play-by-play events?
notes: Baseline count of play_by_play table. Verified: 49548 events.

utterance: How many distinct event types are there?
notes: COUNT DISTINCT on event_type column in play_by_play.

utterance: How many shot attempts did the team take in Q1?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE period = 1
notes: Single period filter. Verified: 1944 shots in Q1.

gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE period = 1 AND shot_type = '3PT Field Goal'
notes: Turn 2: carries forward period = 1; adds 3PT filter.

utterance: How many distinct opponents did the Celtics face?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT away_team) FROM games WHERE home_team ILIKE '%Boston%'
notes: Bug 13 resolved: home_team/away_team populated via MATCHUP parse. Verified: 29 distinct opponents.

utterance: How many home games did they play?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games WHERE home_team ILIKE '%Boston%'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games WHERE away_team ILIKE '%Boston%'

utterance: How many shot attempts came from inside the paint?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190
notes: Paint zone filter: ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190. Verified: 3344 shots.

utterance: How many of those were missed?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190 AND made_flag = 0

utterance: How many shots came from beyond 25 feet?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE distance > 25
notes: Distance in whole feet. Deep 3 / half-court range. Straightforward range filter.

utterance: How many plays involved Jayson Tatum?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM play_by_play WHERE player_ids = (SELECT CAST(player_id AS TEXT) FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Jayson Tatum%')
notes: Joins play_by_play.player_ids (stored as text) to players subquery. player_id = 1628369. CAST to TEXT for string comparison.
